rationale: In the citing paper, Villas-Boas and Zhao (2005) appears only in a grouped citation when the authors state that their price endogeneity finding is consistent with prior literature. The article does not assign this cited paper a distinct role in framing hypotheses, constructing the model, or deriving the supply-side equations, which are linked to other references. Thus, this citation functions as background corroboration rather than a meaningful intellectual dependency.
